MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARYANN CHIU'S Motion To Withdraw Or Amend Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted By Court Order Dated Apr 6, 2012 is Continued to May 17, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to provide plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302 no later than 4pm May 10 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has received courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581
